zh.lifeSummary: 當Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët於大約1125年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓拉 特利尼艾-波艾特時，她的父親Geoffrey la Zouche22歲，母親Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany27歲。她於大約1145年與Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1162年8月之後在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蒙特福吉素-。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët于大约1125年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓拉 特利尼艾-波艾特时，她的父亲Geoffrey la Zouche22岁，母亲Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany27岁。她于大约1145年与Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I在法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1162年8月之后在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蒙特福吉素-。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Amicie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval given name derived from Latin ami(ci)tia ‘friendship’ see Amity .

en.lifeSummary: When Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët was born about 1125, in La Trinité-Porhoët, Morbihan, Brittany, France, her father, Geoffrey la Zouche, was 22 and her mother, Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, was 27. She married Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I about 1145, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after August 1162, in Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët est née environ 1125, à La Trinité-Porhoët, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Geoffrey la Zouche, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I environ 1145, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après août 1162, à Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët um 1125 in La Trinité-Porhoët, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey la Zouche 22 und ihre Mutter Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany 27. Sie hat um 1145 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach August 1162 in Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët è nata il circa 1125 nel La Trinité-Porhoët, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Geoffrey la Zouche, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I circa 1145, nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il agosto 1162, nel Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Amicie de Rohun de Porhoëtが約1125年にフランスブレタグンモービハンラ トリニトe-プオローeトで生まれた時，父Geoffrey la Zoucheは22歳，母Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittanyは27歳であった。約1145年にフランスブレタグンモービハンジョセリンでGuillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1162年8月以後にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインモントフォート-スル-メウで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët(이)가 대략 1125년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 라 트리니트e-포호e트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey la Zouche(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1145년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1162년 8월 이후 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 몽포트-수-우에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët nasceu aproximadamente 1125, em La Trinité-Porhoët, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Geoffrey la Zouche, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I aproximadamente 1145, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após agosto de 1162, em Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët родилась около 1125 г. в местности ла тринитe-пороeт, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffrey la Zouche было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I около 1145 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после августа 1162 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-меу, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amicie de Rohun de Porhoët nació aproximadamente 1125, en La Trinité-Porhoët, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey la Zouche, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Hawise de Rennes Duchess of Brittany, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Guillaume de Montfort-le-Hédé I aproximadamente 1145, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de agosto de 1162, en Montfort-sur-Meu, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.
